notes: v0.16.54 — Three things. (1) PLAY hub: CAMPAIGN tile replaced by RIFT — click jumps straight to the RIFTS page (energy gate + picker + run map). Card uses a placeholder portal-vortex animation; final pick will be swapped in once you choose from test_rift_card.tscn in the editor. (2) BOSS RUSH PLAY tile: ship now flies NOSE-FIRST around the boss (was tail-first) and actively shoots at the core. Bullets break on the outer shield with a tiny spark splash. (3) Leaderboard hover tooltip: pre-tracking clears (old rows with empty modules) no longer show 'No loadout recorded' forever — when the row is yours, it falls back to your CURRENT loadout for that class with a 'LIVE LOADOUT · pre-tracking clear' hint. Windows only.
